title: Skills gap: create JT architecture proof-map for AI SA roles
description: First action: write `memory/job-market/architecture-proof-map.md` mapping Spectrum, Altmark, Aya, AgentGuard, AI Context OS, and OpenClaw systems to architecture, governance, integration, rollout, and ROI claims. Why it matters: target JDs value solution architecture, stakeholder discovery, integration architecture, governance, and change management; JT has proof but needs it translated into hiring-manager language. Done: one-page proof-map exists and can be reused by the job-application skill and interview prep.
